evals.prompt: I have a customer asking about slow Odoo performance, not sure where to start
evals.expected_output: Router asks clarifying question (performance is not directly in routing table; should escalate or route to odoo-deprecation-audit / odoo-customization-inventory based on user's follow-up)

evals.prompt: I want to check if Acme's Odoo system has any issues
evals.expected_output: Router outputs collision-resolution template offering odoo-risk-overview vs odoo-customization-inventory (Example 3 case)

evals.prompt: Customer says Odoo is missing feature X — help me respond
evals.expected_output: Router recommends odoo-objection-handler with Collision 1 reasoning

evals.prompt: I don't know what's new in Odoo 18 — write slides for a meeting
evals.expected_output: Router recommends odoo-feature-highlights with Collision 2 reasoning (slide = marketing output)

evals.prompt: Someone asked me if Odoo can handle multi-level approvals
evals.expected_output: Router recommends odoo-feature-check (single-feature availability) or odoo-capability-proof if proof-package signal; row 6 vs row 10

evals.prompt: Please review this patch for me
evals.expected_output: Router recommends odoo-code-reviewer (row 13: review EXISTING code)

evals.prompt: Customer requested 20 features — which does Odoo have, which need building?
evals.expected_output: Router recommends odoo-gap-analysis (row 7: multi-requirement effort matrix)

evals.prompt: I have a long Odoo code snippet, not sure how to review it
evals.expected_output: Router recommends odoo-code-reviewer (row 13: review existing code)

evals.prompt: This customer's loyalty module, break it down for me
evals.expected_output: Router recommends odoo-customization-inventory OR asks clarifying question (could be feature-check if 'loyalty' module is known); ambiguity expected

evals.prompt: Help me audit the system before upgrading
evals.expected_output: Router recommends odoo-deprecation-audit (row 4: audit before upgrade) OR odoo-risk-overview if exec framing

evals.prompt: Write a computed field calculating total_amount for sale.order
evals.expected_output: Router does NOT fire — direct match to odoo-coder (row 12: write code)

evals.prompt: Customer asks about API differences between v16 and v17
evals.expected_output: Router does NOT fire — direct match to odoo-version-diff (row 5: explicit API diff)
Router does NOT fire — direct match to odoo-code-reviewer
Router does NOT fire — explicit slash command

notes: Full Mode 5 trigger optimization scheduled for Phase D per AC-D6 of the v1.0.0 refinement plan (internal). Phase A acceptance is verified via inline walkthrough by main agent (see report). 20-query trigger eval set will be built from these 15 + 5 additional edge cases in Phase D.
